title: A smoother editing experience without bidirectional character warnings
description:
The warning about bidirectional characters has been removed from code blocks in the Confluence Cloud editor and renderer. You will no longer see this message when working with code content. To see this update in action: Open any Confluence content type that uses the cloud editor.
	Add or edit a code block containing bidirectional characters.
	Notice that the previous warning about bidirectional characters no longer appears.
